mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9 percent, labor market deterioration signals imminent corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 9.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, producing positive S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to yield a positive return frequency above 58% over 60-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output, which translates to higher equity valuations over the next month during economic expansion phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 20-day returns with a t-statistic above 1.5 during expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly nonfarm payrolls additions exceeding 150 thousand signal robust labor demand, triggering immediate positive S&P 500 returns within one week.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by > 150k in a single month
failure_condition: Positive 5-day return frequency falls below 52% when PAYEMS exceeds the 150k threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing real GDP growth and accelerating inflation indicates stagflationary pressure, causing negative S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Negative return frequency remains below 45% when GDPC1 growth decelerates while CPIAUCSL accelerates.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate cuts provide liquidity support that lowers equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 returns over one month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of instances when FEDFUNDS declines while UNRATE exceeds 8.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and housing starts reflect broad-based economic momentum, driving positive S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.01 over rolling 2-year windows when both series trend upward.
